This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

      mage-cache-timeoutThis cookie is necessary for the cache function. A cache is used by the website to optimize the response time between the visitor and the website. The cache is usually stored on the visitor’s browser.

      mage-customer-loginThis cookie is used to manage user logins and customer sessions on websites powered by the Magento platform. It stores information required to keep you logged in to your customer account as you navigate between different pages on the website.

      Maximum Storage Duration: PersistentType: HTML Local Storage

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.

The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.

This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.

You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.

Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.

Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.

club

Logga in for att ta del av medlemsförmåner och exklusiva erbjudanden. Verifiera dig tryggt med BankID eller logga in med e-post.
  1. Starta BankID-appen i din mobil
  2. Tryck på Skanna QR-kod
  3. Rikta kameran mot QR-koden här ovanför
  4. Följ instruktionerna i appen för att logga in

        Hemleverans

        Efter ditt köp levererar vi produkten direkt till din dörr på uppgjord tid. Enkelt!

        Installation

        Vi kopplar bort din gamla produkt och sedan monterar och installerar vi din nya!

        återvinning

        När allt är klart tar vi hand om allt emballage och kör bort din gamla produkt för återvinning.

        Läs mer om våra tjänster  →
